title: Weekly Market Update: Stocks Gain 0.9% as Energy Rises and Basic Materials Fall
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and sm
excerpt: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and small-cap stocks increased 0.03%.

content.introduction: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and small-cap stocks increased 0.03%.
body: # Weekly Market Update: Stocks Fall as Energy Rises and Basic Materials Falter. ## Stock Market Update for the Trading Week Ended March 6. Celsius Holdings CELH, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings NCLH, Perrigo PRGO, and Carnival CCL did the worst among US-listed stocks covered by Morningstar analysts.
